ns0:entry.ns0:title: AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT
Language: jupyter-notebook
FinGPT: Open-Source Financial Large Language Models! Revolutionize 🔥 We release the trained model on HuggingFace.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
Language: jupyter-notebook
End-to-end, code-first tutorials for building production-grade GenAI agents. From prototype to enterprise deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/courses
Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: charliedream1/ai_quant_trade
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/charliedream1/ai_quant_trade
Language: jupyter-notebook
股票AI操盘手：从学习、模拟到实盘，一站式平台。包含股票知识、策略实例、大模型、因子挖掘、传统策略、机器学习、深度学习、强化学习、图网络、高频交易、C++部署和聚宽实例代码等，可以方便学习、模拟及实盘交易

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chiphuyen/aie-book
